title: EKCD: An EKC-derived Ontology for Korean Cultural Heritage Knowledge Modeling
description: EKCD is an EKC-derived ontology in OWL/Turtle for Korean cultural heritage knowledge modeling. It provides additional datatype properties for dates and URLs, local application guidelines for standard semantic mapping properties, and project-level semantic extensions while preserving conceptual continuity with the EKC ontology line. Version 1.0.7 is a metadata and namespace-clarification release that adds VOAF/VANN vocabulary metadata and clarifies the Korean usage description of ekcd:occurrenceDate without changing the term inventory.

creators.name: SEO, Dong Shin
creators.affiliation: The Center for Digital Humanities at the Academy of Korean Studies
